version_description: I went into some extra detail and wrote it in the original key for beginners to be able to process the changes quickly.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]C#m/G#[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m/C#[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]   [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                        [ch]F#7[/ch]
I know I have good judgment, I know I have good taste[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]E7[/ch]
It's funny and it's ironic that only I feel that way[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                                     [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]
I promise 'em that you're different and everyone makes mistakes[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E7[/ch]
But just don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                            [ch]F#7[/ch]
I heard that you're an actor, so act like a stand-up guy[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]E7[/ch]
Whatever devil's inside you, don't let him out tonight[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                                    [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]
I tell them it's just your culture and everyone rolls their eyes[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E7[/ch]
Yeah, I know (all I'm asking, baby)[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]           [ch]C#m/G#[/ch]
Please, please, please[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Don't prove I'm right[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And please, pleasе, please[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/A[/ch]         [ch]E7[/ch]                       [ch]E7sus4[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Don't bring me to tеars when I just did my makeup so nice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                       [ch]C#m/G#[/ch]
Heartbreak is one thing, my ego's another[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I beg you, don't embarrass me, motherfucker[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m/C#[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]
Ah, oh[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E7[/ch]              [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
Please, please, please (Ah, ah, ah)[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]A7[/ch]
Well, I have a fun idea, babe (Uh-huh), maybe just stay inside[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]                                          [ch]G7[/ch]
I know you're craving some fresh air, but the ceiling fan is so nice (It's so nice, right?)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F6[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
And we could live so happily if no one knows that you're with me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C/E[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Gsus4[/ch]
I'm just kidding, but really (Kinda), really, really[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]           [ch]C#m/G#[/ch]
Please, please, please[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Don't prove I'm right[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And please, pleasе, please[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/A[/ch]         [ch]E7[/ch]                       [ch]E7sus4[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]
Don't bring me to tеars when I just did my makeup so nice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]                       [ch]C#m/G#[/ch]
Heartbreak is one thing, my ego's another[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I beg you, don't embarrass me, motherfucker[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m/C#[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Ah, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]              [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
Please, please, please (Ah, ah, ah)[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]E7[/ch]
If you wanna go and be stupid[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]             [ch]C#7[/ch]
Don't do it in front of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]E7[/ch]
If you don't wanna cry to my music[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]               [ch]C#7[/ch]
Don't make me hate you prolifically[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Please, please, please (Please)[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Please, please, please (Please)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]             [ch]F#m7[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]
Please (Please), please (Please), please[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dm6[/ch]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
(Ahhhhhhhhhhhhhh)[/tab]
